report_header:
What is OpenAI's latest product?
Generated: 2026-03-29 | 09:02 UTC
Total Sources Analysed: 8
Official Insights: 4 | Trusted Insights: 4
Classification: INTERNAL USE -- R&D
Produced by Barista Competitive Intelligence Tool
introduction: OpenAI has been at the forefront of AI innovation, and its latest products, GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex, are significant advancements in the field. GPT-5.2 is designed for professional knowledge work, while GPT-5.2-Codex is focused on professional software engineering and defensive cybersecurity. These products have the potential to transform the way businesses and individuals work, and their impact will be felt across various industries.
strategic_significance: The introduction of GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex is strategically significant for OpenAI, as it demonstrates the company's commitment to advancing AI technology and making it more accessible to businesses and individuals. This move is likely to strengthen OpenAI's position in the market and increase its competitiveness.
research_scope: The research scope for this report includes an analysis of OpenAI's latest products, GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex, and their potential impact on the market.
official_intelligence: According to OpenAI's official sources, GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex are designed to provide advanced AI capabilities for professional knowledge work and software engineering, respectively.
market_context: The market context for OpenAI's latest products is highly competitive, with several other companies also developing AI technologies. However, OpenAI's commitment to advancing AI technology and making it more accessible to businesses and individuals sets it apart from its competitors.
report_structure: This report provides an overview of OpenAI's latest products, GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex, and their potential impact on the market. It includes an executive summary, introduction, strategic significance, research scope, official intelligence, market context, and conclusion.
executive_summary: OpenAI has introduced GPT-5.2, a new model series designed for professional knowledge work, which outperforms industry professionals in various tasks and sets a new standard for AI capabilities. Additionally, OpenAI has released GPT-5.2-Codex, an advanced agentic coding model for professional software engineering and defensive cybersecurity. These products demonstrate OpenAI's commitment to advancing AI technology and making it more accessible to businesses and individuals.
conflict_and_consensus: There are no significant conflicts between the official and trusted sources. Both sources agree on the introduction of GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex as OpenAI's latest products.

key_findings.finding_summary: OpenAI has introduced GPT-5.2 and GPT-5.2-Codex, which are designed to provide advanced AI capabilities for professional knowledge work and software engineering, respectively.

official_insights.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership
official_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI and Amazon have announced a multi-year strategic partnership to accelerate AI innovation, including the co-creation of a Stateful Runtime Environment powered by OpenAI models, available on Amazon Bedrock, and the exclusive distribution of OpenAI Frontier on AWS. Amazon will invest $50 billion in OpenAI.
official_insights.detailed_summary: OpenAI and Amazon have announced a multi-year strategic partnership to accelerate AI innovation, including the co-creation of a Stateful Runtime Environment powered by OpenAI models, available on Amazon Bedrock, and the exclusive distribution of OpenAI Frontier on AWS. Amazon will invest $50 billion in OpenAI.
official_insights.reasoning: The partnership aims to bring advanced AI capabilities to enterprises worldwide, with a focus on stateful developer environments, AI agent deployment, and customized models for Amazon's customer-facing applications.
key_metrics: $50 billion investment by Amazon in OpenAI
2 gigawatts of Trainium capacity to be consumed by OpenAI through AWS infrastructure
$100 billion expansion of the existing $38 billion multi-year agreement
8-year term of the expanded agreement
key_features: Stateful Runtime Environment powered by OpenAI models
OpenAI Frontier for building, deploying, and managing teams of AI agents
Customized models for Amazon's customer-facing applications
Integration with Amazon Bedrock and AWS infrastructure services
Trainium compute for powering advanced workloads

official_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI has announced $110B in new investment at a $730B pre-money valuation, with partnerships with Amazon, NVIDIA, and SoftBank, to expand its global reach, infrastructure, and balance sheet, and bring frontier AI to more people and businesses.

official_insights.reasoning: The investment and partnerships will enable OpenAI to scale its infrastructure and products, including Codex, ChatGPT, and the Frontier platform, to meet surging demand for AI across consumers, developers, and businesses.

official_insights.title: Introducing GPT-5.2-Codex
official_insights.brief_summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5.2-Codex, an advanced agentic coding model for professional software engineering and defensive cybersecurity. It is a version of GPT-5.2 optimized for agentic coding in Codex, with improvements in long-horizon work, large code changes, Windows environments, and cybersecurity capabilities.
official_insights.detailed_summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5.2-Codex, an advanced agentic coding model for professional software engineering and defensive cybersecurity. It is a version of GPT-5.2 optimized for agentic coding in Codex, with improvements in long-horizon work, large code changes, Windows environments, and cybersecurity capabilities.
official_insights.reasoning: The release of GPT-5.2-Codex demonstrates OpenAI's continued advancement in the intelligence frontier, with a focus on specialized domains such as cybersecurity. The model's capabilities have the potential to strengthen cybersecurity at scale, but also raise dual-use risks that require careful deployment.

references.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership - OpenAI
references.snippet:
This commitment spans both Trainium3 and next-generation Trainium4 chips and will power a broad range of advanced AI workloads. Trainium4, expected to begin delivery in 2027, will provide another major performance gain, including significantly higher FP4 compute performance, expanded memory bandwidth, and increased high-bandwidth memory capacity to support increasingly capable AI systems at scale.

Custom models available to power Amazon’s customer-facing applications [...] Stateful developer environments are the next generation of how frontier models will be used, seamlessly enabling models to access elements like compute, memory, and identity. A Stateful Runtime Environment allows developers to keep context, remember prior work, work across software tools and data sources, and access compute. They're designed to handle ongoing projects and workflows.

These stateful developer environments will be trained to run optimally on AWS's infrastructure and integrated with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore and infrastructure services so customers’ AI applications and agents run cohesively with the rest of their infrastructure applications running in AWS. The Stateful Runtime Environment is expected to launch in the next few months. [...] — Sam Altman, co-founder and CEO of OpenAI

references.title: Scaling AI for everyone - OpenAI
references.snippet:
You can see that scale in our products. Codex brings the power of a top engineer to anyone who wants to build software. Weekly Codex users have more than tripled since the start of the year to 1.6M. More people are now creating, automating, and shipping software that once required a full engineering team.

More than 9 million paying business users rely on ChatGPT for work, and startups, enterprises, and governments are building on the OpenAI platform to transform how their products and services are designed, delivered, and run. Teams start with individual productivity and move quickly to deployment across engineering, support, finance, sales, and operations. Our Frontier platform helps enterprises build, deploy, and manage AI coworkers. [...] ChatGPT is where people start with AI, with more than 900M weekly active users, and we now have more than 50 million consumer subscribers.. Subscriber momentum accelerated meaningfully to start the year, with January and February on track to be the largest months for new subscribers in our history. People use ChatGPT to learn, write, plan, and build. As usage scales, the product improves in ways people feel immediately: faster responses, higher reliability, stronger safety, and more consistent performance. [...] Scaling AI for everyone | OpenAI

| ARC-AGI-2 (Verified) Abstract reasoning | 52.9% | 17.6% | [...] GPT‑5.2 Thinking is also better at front-end software engineering than GPT‑5.1 Thinking. Early testers found it significantly stronger at front-end development and complex or unconventional UI work—especially involving 3D elements—making it a powerful daily partner for engineers across the stack. See a few examples of what it can produce from a single prompt:

`Prompt:` `Create a single-page app in a single HTML file with the following requirements:  
- Name: Ocean Wave Simulation  
- Goal: Display realistic animated waves.  
- Features: Change wind speed, wave height, lighting.  
- The UI should be calming and realistic.`

references.title: Introducing GPT-5.2-Codex - OpenAI
references.snippet:
Switch to

 ChatGPT(opens in a new window)
 Sora(opens in a new window)
 API Platform(opens in a new window)

OpenAI

December 18, 2025

ProductRelease

# Introducing GPT-5.2-Codex

The most advanced agentic coding model for professional software engineering and defensive cybersecurity.

$ npm i -g @openai/codex

Today we’re releasing GPT‑5.2-Codex, the most advanced agentic coding model yet for complex, real-world software engineering. GPT‑5.2-Codex is a version of GPT‑5.2⁠ further optimized for agentic coding in Codex, including improvements on long-horizon work through context compaction, stronger performance on large code changes like refactors and migrations, improved performance in Windows environments, and significantly stronger cybersecurity capabilities. [...] By rolling GPT‑5.2-Codex out gradually, pairing deployment with safeguards, and working closely with the security community, we’re aiming to maximize defensive impact while reducing the risk of misuse. What we learn from this release will directly inform how we expand access over time as the software and cyber frontiers continue to advance.

 2025
 OpenAI Codex

## Author

OpenAI

Publication [...] We're releasing GPT‑5.2-Codex today in all Codex surfaces for paid ChatGPT users, and working towards safely enabling access to GPT‑5.2-Codex for API users in the coming weeks. In parallel, we’re piloting invite-only trusted access to upcoming capabilities and more permissive models for vetted professionals and organizations focused on defensive cybersecurity work. We believe that this approach to deployment will balance accessibility with safety.

## Pushing the frontier on real-world software engineering

Weekly Codex users have more than tripled since the start of the year to 1.6M. More people are now creating, automating, and shipping software that once required a full engineering team.

More than 9 million paying business users rely on ChatGPT for work, and startups, enterprises, and governments are building on the OpenAI platform to transform how their products and services are designed, delivered, and run. Teams start with individual productivity and move quickly to deployment across engineering, support, finance, sales, and operations. Our Frontier platform helps enterprises build, deploy, and manage AI coworkers. [...] We are entering a new phase where frontier AI moves from research into daily use at global scale. Leadership will be defined by who can scale infrastructure fast enough to meet demand, and turn that capacity into products people rely on. This funding and these partnerships let us do both, and move faster on our mission to ensure AGI benefits all of humanity.

The valuation from this new round increases the value of the OpenAI Foundation’s stake in OpenAI Group to over $180 billion, further strengthening what was already one of the most well-resourced nonprofits in history, and expands its capacity to fund philanthropy in areas such as health breakthroughs and AI resilience.

Our Partnership with Amazon

references.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership - OpenAI
references.snippet:
OpenAI and Amazon will collaborate to develop customized models available to Amazon developers to power Amazon’s customer-facing applications. Amazon teams will be able to tailor OpenAI models for use across AI products and agents that serve customers directly. These capabilities will complement the models already available to Amazon developers, including Amazon’s Nova family, offering another tool for teams to build and deliver at scale.

OpenAI Amazon

> “OpenAI and Amazon share a belief that AI should show up in ways that are practical and genuinely useful for people. Combining OpenAI’s intelligence with Amazon’s infrastructure and global reach helps us put powerful AI into the hands of businesses and users at real scale.”

— Sam Altman, co-founder and CEO of OpenAI [...] OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership | OpenAI



   Research
   Products
   Business
   Developers
   Company
   Foundation

OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership | OpenAI

Table of contents

   Partnering to bring new advanced AI capabilities to enterprises worldwide
   Bringing OpenAI’s most advanced enterprise platform to AWS customers
   OpenAI to use Trainium compute to power growing Amazon customer demand
   Custom models available to power Amazon’s customer-facing applications

February 27, 2026

Company

OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership

Listen to article

Share

News: [...] Stateful developer environments are the next generation of how frontier models will be used, seamlessly enabling models to access elements like compute, memory, and identity. A Stateful Runtime Environment allows developers to keep context, remember prior work, work across software tools and data sources, and access compute. They're designed to handle ongoing projects and workflows.

These stateful developer environments will be trained to run optimally on AWS's infrastructure and integrated with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore and infrastructure services so customers’ AI applications and agents run cohesively with the rest of their infrastructure applications running in AWS. The Stateful Runtime Environment is expected to launch in the next few months.

# Introducing GPT-5.2

The most advanced frontier model for professional work and long-running agents.

We are introducing GPT‑5.2, the most capable model series yet for professional knowledge work.

Already, the average ChatGPT Enterprise user says⁠ AI saves them 40–60 minutes a day, and heavy users say it saves them more than 10 hours a week. We designed GPT‑5.2 to unlock even more economic value for people; it’s better at creating spreadsheets, building presentations, writing code, perceiving images, understanding long contexts, using tools, and handling complex, multi-step projects.
